name: usage-summary
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/billing.js, dispatch key 'billing.usage-summary'); SubscriptionBillingSuite calls it via lensRun. In-memory per-user state. totalQuantity is summed from STORED usage records — and usage-record fail-CLOSES at the write boundary (billNum(quantity) then reject `quantity <= 0`, so a poisoned 'Infinity'/'NaN' collapses to 0 and is rejected, never persisted). Tier prices route through billNum (non-finite → 0). The assassin's fresh state has no recorded usage, so summary returns totalQuantity:0 / totalCharge:0 with an empty breakdown — finite by construction. Pinned by server/tests/billing-lens-macros.test.js (exact 5000-unit graduated rollup = 8.00 + poison-quantity rejection).
